{{Quote|The mutants will kill him if you don't open the gate!|Hester upon seeing Hendar running from the [[rakghoul]]s|<ref name="kotor" />}}
'''Hester''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] native to the [[Undercity (Taris)|Undercity]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].

==Biography==
Hester's husband, [[Hendar]], left the [[Undercity (Taris)|Undercity]] village to go into the [[rakghoul]]-infested lands. Upon his return, he was being pursued by a rakghoul. She asked [[Trewin]] the gatekeeper to open the gate and let him in. Trewin refused, believing the danger of the rakghoul entering the village too great, until [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] volunteered to help Hendar combat the rakghoul. When the beast was defeated, Hendar was reunited with his Hester, much to her relief.<ref name="kotor" />

Like all the other Outcasts, she left for the [[Promised Land]].<ref name="kotor" />

==Behind the scenes==
If Revan takes too long to defeat the rakghoul, Hendar will die and Hester will run away crying.

If Revan refuses to help Hendar, she shouts at him as Hendar is killed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
